name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected

labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction

A minimal code snippet that reproduces the problem:

```python
import ancestree

# ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened, including the full traceback if there was an error.

## Environment

- Ancestree version: <!-- e.g. 0.1.0 -->
- Python version: <!-- e.g. 3.11 -->
- Operating system: <!-- e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 -->

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — file layout, store contents, screenshots, etc.
